# PostgreSQL Query Test Data

This folder contains PostgreSQL-formatted query suites for converter testing.

## Files
- SingleSelect.sql: Single-table SELECT patterns
- JoinSelect.sql: JOIN variants
- Subqueries.sql: Scalar/correlated/EXISTS subqueries
- CTE.sql: Common table expressions
- Aggregates.sql: GROUP BY and HAVING patterns
- WindowFunctions.sql: Window-function patterns
- SetOperators.sql: UNION / INTERSECT / EXCEPT patterns
